issues.message: 'ResponseBodyCollector' conforms to @unchecked Sendable with mutable stored properties but has no visible synchronization. This is likely a thread-safety bug.
issues.suggestion: Add synchronization (NSLock, DispatchQueue, OSAllocatedUnfairLock, etc.), make properties immutable (let), or convert to an actor.

issues.message: Closure type for 'handler' in @unchecked Sendable class is missing @Sendable. Closures that cross concurrency boundaries must be @Sendable.
issues.suggestion: Add @Sendable before the closure type: @Sendable (BodyStreamResult, EventLoopPromise<Void>?) -> ()

issues.message: Non-Sendable class instance 'unsafeExecute' is captured in a Task closure, crossing a concurrency boundary. This may cause data races.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the captured type conforms to Sendable, use an actor instead, or pass only value types across the boundary.

issues.message: 'NIOLoopBound' conforms to @unchecked Sendable with mutable stored properties but has no visible synchronization. This is likely a thread-safety bug.
issues.suggestion: Add synchronization (NSLock, DispatchQueue, OSAllocatedUnfairLock, etc.), make properties immutable (let), or convert to an actor.

issues.message: 'NIOLoopBoundBox' conforms to @unchecked Sendable with mutable stored properties but has no visible synchronization. This is likely a thread-safety bug.
issues.suggestion: Add synchronization (NSLock, DispatchQueue, OSAllocatedUnfairLock, etc.), make properties immutable (let), or convert to an actor.

issues.message: Closure type for '_' in @unchecked Sendable class is missing @Sendable. Closures that cross concurrency boundaries must be @Sendable.
issues.suggestion: Add @Sendable before the closure type: @Sendable (Failure) -> Success

issues.suggestion: Add synchronization (NSLock, DispatchQueue, OSAllocatedUnfairLock, etc.), make properties immutable (let), or convert to an actor.

issues.message: Non-Sendable class instance 'data' is captured in a Task closure, crossing a concurrency boundary. This may cause data races.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the captured type conforms to Sendable, use an actor instead, or pass only value types across the boundary.

issues.message: 'Unchecked' conforms to @unchecked Sendable with mutable stored properties but has no visible synchronization. This is likely a thread-safety bug.
issues.suggestion: Add synchronization (NSLock, DispatchQueue, OSAllocatedUnfairLock, etc.), make properties immutable (let), or convert to an actor.

issues.message: Closure type for '_' in @unchecked Sendable class is missing @Sendable. Closures that cross concurrency boundaries must be @Sendable.
issues.suggestion: Add @Sendable before the closure type: @Sendable (inout Value) -> R

issues.message: 'JSON' conforms to @unchecked Sendable with mutable stored properties but has no visible synchronization. This is likely a thread-safety bug.
issues.suggestion: Add synchronization (NSLock, DispatchQueue, OSAllocatedUnfairLock, etc.), make properties immutable (let), or convert to an actor.
